name: Felt Double Laundry Hamper Oatmeal - Brightroom™: Polyester, 6000 Volume, Adjustable, Open-Top, Kids' & Baby Clothes Sorter
description:
Elevate your laundry chores with this Felt Double Laundry Hamper from Brightroom™. This laundry hamper has an elegant oatmeal-hued silhouette with cut-out handles for easy loading and unloading of clothes. The open-top design allows for quick and easy access when loading and unloading, while the deep oval shape provides ample space for holding dirty clothes, offering a clean aesthetic.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
